selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: the card is explicit under «ndarray, dtype y shape»: «dtype fija el tipo (p. ej. float64, int32)». shape is dimensions, ndim is len(shape), base relates to views — not the homogeneous element type. So dtype.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Filtrar o seleccionar elementos que cumplen la condición
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «creación, indexación y máscaras» says a boolean mask `a > umbral` produces bools and `a[mask]` filters — «forma idiomática de calidad». Other options (change dtype / force copy / increase ndim) are not the primary use stated.

[A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «ufuncs y reducciones» states «axis=0 reduce filas→agrega por columna». On a 2D matrix that collapses rows into per-column aggregates. Not pandas-only; not [0,0].

selfcheck.chosen_text: Puede mutar el array base porque suele ser un view
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: «views/copies y mutabilidad» — «Slices simples suelen ser views»; «Mutar un view muta el original». So mutating a simple slice can mutate the base array.
